title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for a device that is not currently connected
scenario: Fit Test page should not be displayed or accessible during onboarding when the device is not connected
steps: 1. Ensure a device is not currently connected.
2. Navigate to the onboarding screens for that device.
3. Observe the list of onboarding screens displayed.
4. Attempt to start a Fit Test for the device that is not connected.
expected: The Fit Test page should not be displayed as part of the onboarding screens. Starting a Fit Test for a device that is not connected should not be possible.
